items.headline: Here’s Why The Charles Schwab (SCHW) Is One of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June
items.summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. items.headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
items.summary: Shares of financial services giant Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) jumped 3% in the afternoon session after the company released a strong monthly activity report for May 2026, showing significant growth in client assets and trading activity.

items.headline: Week’s Best: Investing in Energy as the War Winds Down
items.summary: The Iran war sent oil and gas prices surging and sharpened investors’ focus on energy investments.  Now that the conflict appears likely to end, the question is how to play the sector: Some investors are leaning into traditional oil-patch names, while others favor pipelines and natural gas.  For a recent Barron’s Advisor Big Q, we asked a panel of investment professionals how they’re putting money to work in energy now.
